# Brainiall NLP API

> Suite of ONNX-optimized NLP APIs: toxicity detection, sentiment analysis, NER, PII detection, language detection. 100-1000x cheaper than LLMs.

## Base URL

https://apim-ai-apis.azure-api.net/v1/nlp

## Authentication

Use any one of: `Authorization: Bearer KEY`, `api-key: KEY`, or `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: KEY`

## Endpoints

- POST /v1/nlp/toxicity — Detect toxic content (6 categories)
- POST /v1/nlp/sentiment — Positive/negative sentiment analysis
- POST /v1/nlp/entities — Named Entity Recognition (PER, ORG, LOC, MISC)
- POST /v1/nlp/pii — PII detection (email, phone, SSN, credit card)
- POST /v1/nlp/language — Language detection (217 languages)
- GET /v1/nlp/health — Service health check

## Pricing

- Toxicity: $0.001/request
- Sentiment: $0.001/request
- Entities: $0.002/request
- PII: $0.002/request
- Language: $0.0005/request

## MCP Server

URL: https://apim-ai-apis.azure-api.net/mcp/nlp/mcp
Tools: analyze_toxicity, analyze_sentiment, extract_entities, detect_pii, detect_language

## Links

- Documentation: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/brainiall-nlp-api
- Full docs: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/brainiall-nlp-api/blob/main/llms-full.txt
- Get API Key: https://brainiall.com
- LLM Gateway: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/brainiall-llm-gateway
- Image APIs: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/brainiall-image-api
